message:
refactor(plan): consolidate tx builder helpers into plan.rs

Move four mission-tx builder functions that were duplicated across
mcp_missions.rs and main.rs into their canonical home in plan.rs,
eliminating ~220 lines of duplication.

Moved functions (now pub in plan.rs with #[must_use]):
- mission_tx_prepare_gate_inputs: build default all-passing gate inputs
- mission_tx_commit_step_inputs: build commit inputs with optional
  single-step failure injection
- mission_tx_compensation_inputs: build compensation inputs for
  committed steps with optional failure injection
- mission_tx_synthetic_commit_report: build all-committed report for
  rollback-only tx surfaces

plan.rs:
- Add all four functions with doc comments and 4 new unit tests
  exercising default behavior, failure injection, and step coverage

mcp_missions.rs:
- Remove the four local copies; update module doc comment to reflect
  narrowed scope (file I/O, state resolution, assignment aggregation)
- Update existing tests to call plan:: versions directly

mcp.rs:
- Import the four functions from plan.rs with mcp_build_* aliases
  matching the existing call-site naming convention
- Remove now-unnecessary imports from mcp_missions

main.rs:
- Import the four functions from plan.rs with build_robot_* aliases
- Remove the four local copies (~110 lines)
- Minor rustfmt fix in test assertion

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
